Hey Excel agents from Claude, OpenAI & MS Copilot: "make me a working strategy game in excel, it should have some form of graphics"

Claude made a board and acted as game master, Copilot created a board but no game, ChatGPT built a working game with formulas with a "smart" enemy.

Gave Claude two more tries, telling it it had to make the game entirely in Excel worksheets. The second one, it also made itself the game master/engine. When I called it out, it created another design that didn't work.

Good storytelling, both visual and written, continues to be a very large barrier to AIs. That doesn't mean they can't prove helpful to creative industries (they obviously can!) but the idea that Hollywood or authors are going to be replaced with AI in longform work isn't true yet

The failures of both Meta and xAI to maintain parity with the frontier labs, along with the fact that the Chinese open weights models continue to lag by months, means that recursive AI self-improvement, if it happens, will likely be by a model from Google, OpenAI and/or Anthropic

It is possible that xAI catches up, certainly Musk has stated that he thinks they can in a year. And Meta still has excellent people and lots of compute. But if you view the critical period, for better or worse, as this year, it is a bad time for a lab to sit this out right now.

Also: 

*EXPOSURE DOES NOT MEAN THREAT OF DISPLACEMENT*

*EXPOSURE DOES NOT MEAN THREAT OF DISPLACEMENT*

*EXPOSURE DOES NOT MEAN THREAT OF DISPLACEMENT*

Ethanol-induced lipid peroxidation is one of the key mechanisms as to why alcohol is toxic in the first place.

since lipid peroxidation can pretty much only happen when PUFA is present, eliminating PUFA is perhaps one of the best ways to prevent any damage from alcohol

Over the course of time a ton of the things that were deemed as 'bro-science' will eventually end up being 'scientifically correct'

n=1 >>> waiting 5 years for RCT to come out

being PUFA depleted allows you to get away with much more bad habits in life, because it quite literally eliminates/reduces one of the main promoters of oxidative stress:

lipid-peroxidation

partaking in 'unhealthy' vices comes at a lower price

smoking, boozing, tanning etc.

So great to see the OG work that helped spark the longevity revolution taken to the next level:

New paper confirms two main causes of aging:
1. DNA instability -> epigenetic noise
2. Mitochondrial decline
...independently causing failure of the cell

Is this relevant to us?

Mitochondrial dysfunction, genome instability and epigenetic noise appear to be central drivers of yeast and possibly human aging. And now, thanks to single-cell technologies, we can finally watch that process unfold cell by cell

FYI - Retracted paper in the NAD field:

Nicotinamide Ameliorates Amyloid Beta-Induced Neurodegeneration in Adult Mouse Brain. 

The editors lost confidence in the findings after "indications" of inappropriate editing & partial duplication 

http://
mdpi.com/2227-9059/14/3
/639
…
Apparently the authors couldn't (or chose not to) provide the original data that was asked of them. Lesson - keep all original data for decades
AI screening of manuscripts by the corresponding author(s) for duplication or fraud (i) before submission and (ii) by the journal and (iii) by reviewers will make this a thing of the past

Exercise increases brain-derived neurotrophic factor, supporting brain plasticity.
Trends in Neurosciences, 2002. Cotman and Berchtold
